ddls:
CREATE TABLE "graphs" (
  "graph_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each graph */,
  "graph_name" TEXT /* Name of the graph dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the graph dataset */,
  "num_nodes" INTEGER /* Number of nodes in the graph */,
  "num_edges" INTEGER /* Number of edges in the graph */,
  "graph_type" TEXT /* Type of graph (e.g., directed, undirected, weighted) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the graph was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the graph was last updated */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* Source URL for the graph data */,
  "license" TEXT /* License for using the graph data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("graph_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used by the algorithm (stored as a JSON object) */,
  "implementation_language" TEXT /* Implementation language of the algorithm (e.g., Python, C++) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benchmarks" (
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benchmark result */,
  "graph_id" INTEGER /* ID of the graph dataset used in the benchmark */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm used in the benchmark */,
  "modularity" REAL /* Modularity score of the community detection */,
  "map_equation" REAL /* MapEquation score of the community detection */,
  "mu" REAL /* Mu parameter used in the algorithm */,
  "iteration" INTEGER /* Iteration number of the algorithm */,
  "graph_num" INTEGER /* Graph number (if applicable) */,
  "runtime" REAL /* Runtime of the algorithm in seconds */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the benchmark was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the benchmark was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the benchmark (e.g., success, failed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benchmark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmarks_graph_id FOREIGN KEY ("graph_id") REFERENCES graphs ("graph_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmarks_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the resource */,
  "graph_id" INTEGER /* ID of the graph dataset accessed */,
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmark result accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, run algorithm) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the resource was accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_graph_id FOREIGN KEY ("graph_id") REFERENCES graphs ("graph_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_benchmark_id FOREIGN KEY ("benchmark_id") REFERENCES benchmarks ("benchmark_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm version */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the algorithm */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Detailed list of changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_versions_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "graph_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each graph version */,
  "graph_id" INTEGER /* ID of the graph dataset */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the graph */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Detailed list of changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_graph_versions_graph_id FOREIGN KEY ("graph_id") REFERENCES graphs ("graph_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm parameter */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_algorithm_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm run */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the run */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm used in the run */,
  "graph_id" INTEGER /* ID of the graph dataset used in the run */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* User-specified parameters for the run (stored as a JSON object) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the run started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the run ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the run (e.g., success, failed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_algorithm_runs_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_algorithm_runs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_algorithm_runs_graph_id FOREIGN KEY ("graph_id") REFERENCES graphs ("graph_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the run that produced this result */,
  "modularity" REAL /* Modularity score of the community detection */,
  "map_equation" REAL /* MapEquation score of the community detection */,
  "mu" REAL /* Mu parameter used in the algorithm */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES user_algorithm_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "result_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result being visualized */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., graph, heatmap, bar chart) */,
  "image" TEXT /* Visualization image data (stored as a BLOB) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the visualization was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the visualization was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_result_visualizations_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES results ("result_id")
)
